requirements.statement: A customer portal is needed with enterprise user login, account history, and support ticket routing.
Support tickets need to route to the right team automatically, with three tiers: billing, technical, and general.
Users need to be kept in the loop on ticket status, with email notifications at minimum.
The account history needs to be at least 24 months, with filterable by date and type.
The system needs to be GDPR compliant.
Admins need to see everything across all accounts, with a separate view for their own accounts.
Admins need to be able to impersonate a user for support purposes.
Notifications need to be sent via email at minimum.
Access control needs to be implemented, with separate views for end users and admins.

solutions.statement: A customer portal is needed with enterprise user login, account history, and support ticket routing.
assumptions: Should be fine for the scale they're talking about

gaps.description: The account history needs to be at least 24 months, but the solution only covers 12 months.
gaps.suggested_action: Clarify why the solution only covers 12 months and provide a plan to extend it to 24 months.

gaps.description: The solution only covers 12 months, but the requirement specifies at least 24 months.
gaps.suggested_action: Review and revise the scope limitations for SOL-004 to match the requirement.

gaps.description: The solution assumes that GDPR compliance for the EU deployment is sufficient, but it does not provide details on how to implement it.
gaps.suggested_action: Request detailed information on how to implement GDPR compliance for the EU deployment.

gaps.description: The requirement specifies separate views for end users and admins, but the solution does not provide clear details on how to implement this.
gaps.suggested_action: Request clarification on how to implement separate views for end users and admins.

gaps.description: Notifications need to be sent via email at minimum, but the solution only mentions SendGrid without specifying the requirements for email notifications.
gaps.suggested_action: Request detailed information on how to implement email notifications using SendGrid.

gaps.description: SMS notifications are a nice-to-have, but the solution does not provide any details on how to implement them.
gaps.suggested_action: Request clarification on whether SMS notifications are still required and how to implement them if necessary.

gaps.description: The solution does not provide clear details on how to implement separate views for end users and admins.
gaps.suggested_action: Request clarification on how to implement separate views for end users and admins.
